identity.canonical_title: \texorpdfstring{\(\mu \propto M R^{2}\Omega\)}{mu proportional to MR^2 Omega} Universal Scaling Law

theory.canonical_statement: The magnetic moment scales with the product of mass, square of size, and rotation rate across 47 orders of magnitude, indicating a deep link between inertial and magnetic properties.
theory.technical_interpretation: The magnetic moment scales with the product of mass, square of size, and rotation rate across 47 orders of magnitude, indicating a deep link between inertial and magnetic properties.

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This collects the mass, geometric extent, and angular speed that seed the magnetic moment.
This extracts the normalized coefficient that can be compared across systems.
This closes the progression by promoting the rotational scale product into a universal predictive law for magnetic moment.
